game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **創作ハンバーガー堂** In Burger Shop Story, players manage a hamburger restaurant by tapping on UI elements to place equipment, hire staff, and manage inventory. The core loop involves creating new burger recipes by combining up to three ingredients, such as "Fish Fry" + "Tartar Sauce" or "Bacon" + "Lettuce" + "Fried Egg," then selling them to customers whose satisfaction and spending are influenced by menu variety and quality. Players research new ingredients from different suppliers and develop side menus and desserts, with successful combinations increasing menu popularity scores and attracting more customers. Staff members, hired from a pool of applicants, gain experience and level up through continuous work, improving their speed and efficiency in tasks like cooking and serving, which directly impacts customer throughput and revenue. Progression involves earning sufficient profits to expand the shop, unlock new research tiers for advanced ingredients, and eventually open additional branches in new cities, competing against rival burger chains to achieve the highest regional sales and customer satisfaction ratings over a multi-year in-game calendar.
game_info.description: Welcome to Burger Shop Story! Build and manage your hamburger restaurant empire. Create unique burger recipes by combining ingredients, hire and train staff to serve customers efficiently, and research new ingredients to expand your menu. Earn profits to upgrade your shop, unlock advanced recipes, and achieve the highest customer satisfaction rating. Your goal is to reach $10,000 in total revenue while maintaining a high satisfaction score.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and UI elements
Space: Confirm selection / Hire staff / Purchase items
Z: Cancel / Go back to previous menu
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates the core game loop. Tests menu navigation, ingredient purchasing, recipe creation, and customer service mechanics. Ensures that the game responds correctly to inputs and state changes occur as expected.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all main menus systematically. Purchase basic ingredients, create simple burger recipes, hire one staff member, and serve a few customers. Verify that money decreases with purchases and increases with sales.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate all menus, create at least one recipe, hire one staff member, and serve multiple customers. Game state should update correctly with inventory changes, money transactions, and staff hiring. No errors or crashes should occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test that implements an optimal strategy to reach $10,000 revenue and achieve victory. Tests the full game progression from start to win condition, including recipe optimization, staff management, and efficient customer service.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Rapidly purchase diverse ingredients to create high-variety recipes that maximize customer satisfaction and spending. Hire multiple staff members early to increase service speed. Focus on creating 3-ingredient premium burgers for higher profits. Continuously serve customers and reinvest profits into more ingredients and staff.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching $10,000 total revenue within a reasonable timeframe. Customer satisfaction should remain high throughout. The test validates that the win condition is achievable and the game progression is balanced.
